_comment: Python stack permission-allowlist ADDITIONS. The install concierge UNIONS permissions.allow into .claude/settings.json (on top of the base read-only set). Every command here is a safe, everyday dev operation: pytest/ruff/mypy/pyright read source (ruff format writes only style); uv/poetry sync/lock/tree/list and pip list/show/freeze are project-env or read-only introspection; a plain in-venv install writes only the project virtualenv from the lockfile. The DANGEROUS variants are NOT waved through — a global/system/user-site install (sudo, --user, --break-system-packages, uv pip --system, uv tool, pipx), a venv wipe, and any publish stay gated by .claude/hooks/pretooluse-safety-gates.sh (see gate-fragment.sh), which overrides this allowlist. `twine upload` and tool `publish` are deliberately ABSENT here. Wildcard `:*` covers arguments.
